name: API Security Assessment
description: Specialized API security testing focusing on OWASP API Security Top 10, authentication, authorization, and data exposure risks.

pipeline.name: API Discovery & Documentation
pipeline.description: Discover API endpoints and generate OpenAPI spec

pipeline.name: Authentication Testing
pipeline.description: Test JWT, OAuth, API key, and session management

pipeline.name: Injection & Bypass Testing
pipeline.description: SQL injection, NoSQL injection, parameter tampering, IDOR, SSRF

pipeline.name: Rate Limiting & Abuse Testing
pipeline.description: Test rate limiting, brute force protections, and abuse controls

pipeline.name: API Security Report
pipeline.description: Generate OWASP API Security Top 10 mapped report
